title: Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals 27 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Drug Use Disorder Issues Hispanic/Latino Community Homelessness Issues Native American Community Pregnant Individuals AIDS/HIV Issues Pregnant Individuals AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG OREGON MOTHERSCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps pregnant people get connected to prenatal care and other resources in their communities. Services include health insurance navigation, such as OHP application assistance, prenatal care appointment scheduling, health education, and community referrals. Referrals can be provided for WIC, dental care, home visiting programs, and other prenatal support services. 150 Kenneth Ford Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Any pregnant person is eligible for OMC, regardless of their income or insurance status Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 672-9596 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BAKER COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH OREGON MOTHERSCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps pregnant people get connected to prenatal care and other resources in their communities. Services include pregnancy testing, OHP application assistance, streamlined intake/referral for prenatal care, and dental care referrals. The Perinatal Care Coordination program is able to provide individual case management during the prenatal and postpartum periods.
